items.title: Apple Cedes Most-Valuable Crown After Tariff Pain Hits Stock Price
items.description: How much has President Trump’s tariff plan cost Apple?  It is no longer the world’s most valuable company.  Apple’s shares fell 5% for the day and are now down 23% since last week’s tariff announcement.

items.title: Microsoft, Google AI Ties Spark Antitrust Questions From Lawmakers
items.description: Lawmakers question whether cloud giants' deals with AI startups could hurt competition and lead to higher prices

items.title: Tesla, Amazon, and Apple forfeit gains after fleeting Magnificent 7 stock rally
items.description: The trade-war selloff took a breather earlier on Tuesday, buoying Big Tech firms including Nvidia (NVDA), Tesla (TSLA), Meta (META), and Microsoft (MSFT), after a mixed day on Monday and two especially gnarly days last week wiped $1.8 trillion off the market value of leading tech stocks.
